mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
